title: You Can Get These Flagship Sony ANC Headphones for Free When You Buy a Surface Pro or Laptop
summary: I used the Surface Pro for many years and can vouch that they are worth the money. The Surface Laptop is better for those who prefer a classic laptop design but like what the Surface lineup has to offer.
